title: aeluropus lagopoides
intro: Aeluropus lagopoides, also known as saltwort or sea couch grass, is a perennial grass species native to coastal regions in the Mediterranean, Africa, and the Middle East. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aeluropus lagopoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular natural remedy for colds, fever, and other ailments. Aeluropus lagopoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a range of herbal preparations.
